filesCreated.purpose: Frontend JS with ResizeObserver to cap .top-gradient max-height to <main> element height, scoped to .post-hero wrappers

testPage.note: Test page exists as a post (type: post), not a page. State record was correct. Page verified as published at https://ign.localhost/blog/test-post-hero/

output.notes: PostHero.js follows the exact pattern of Hero.js but scopes querySelector to '.post-hero .top-gradient' instead of '.top-gradient'. This ensures the ResizeObserver only targets PostHero block instances and does not interfere with Hero block instances. The file is auto-bundled by the webpack glob pattern './blocks/**/!(*index).js' — no manual registration required. No CSS changes were needed as PostHero inherits the 150vh gradient height from Hero.css via the shared 'hero' class on the wrapper.
